name: Agent Delegation
description: Inter-agent communication tools for multi-agent collaboration. Ping, discover, and delegate tasks to remote Wunderland agents over HTTP.

extensions.description: Check if a remote Wunderland agent is reachable and get its metadata (name, tools, channels, personas).
Send a task or question to a remote Wunderland agent and receive its response.
Send the same task to multiple remote agents in parallel and aggregate their responses.

features: Ping remote agents to check liveness and capabilities
Delegate tasks to specific agents by URL
Broadcast tasks to multiple agents in parallel
Timeout and error handling with actionable messages
